description_long: This is a small, standalone ice cream shop with a red brick exterior and a flat, gray roof topped by a central white-trimmed vent or chimney. The front features a wide, striped blue-and-white awning that extends over a service counter, providing shade for customers. Large, white-framed windows are present on all visible sides, allowing natural light into the interior. On one side, there is a fenced wooden patio area with green benches, suggesting outdoor seating for patrons. The shop sits on a paved lot with a defined curb, indicating its placement in an urban or suburban environment. Decorative white trim and a simple, geometric form give the building a clean, inviting appearance.
description: A compact red brick ice cream shop with a striped awning, large windows, and a fenced outdoor seating area on a paved lot.
description_view_0: The rear view shows two large windows, a wooden fence enclosing a patio with green benches, and the side of the striped awning.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the wide blue-and-white striped awning, the main service counter, and the entrance area.
description_view_2: The opposite rear view displays two large windows, a black bench, and the side of the awning, with the patio area visible on the right.
description_view_3: The side view reveals the fenced outdoor seating area with benches and the chimney structure on the roof.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A service counter is present at the front, sheltered by a wide blue-and-white striped awning, accessible from the sidewalk.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Outdoor seating is present, consisting of green benches within a fenced wooden patio area on the side of the shop.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro with simple geometric lines, red brickwork, white trim, and a striped awning.
